TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chris_Bosh, title = Chris_Bosh, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chris_Bosh} }

S.FORM: == Chris Bosh == Chris Bosh hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Chris Bosh, squliq na p'unro. squ kawas tay 2019, wal malax squ Chris Bosh. Chris Bosh hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Chris Bosh htagan beh sa t'k'sasco talass.mrkyas beh hacys.Chris Bosh ru sswe mlikuy (joel) krryax mzyu mari maki ngasal.(Joel hiya Bosh sswe mlikuy.) trang payat kawas nya, aring mqbaq mzyu mari maki yaba pqnahan. baha hmswa wagiq balay inqyasan nya,yasa thoyay maku mzyu mari kryax. Bosh si ki tehok pqwasan laqi cikuy aring mqbaq mzyu mari smsum mpspung cyux maki lingay ngasal yaki mu. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Chris Bosh sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (2008) na Olympic Games. champion NBA(2012,2013). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Chris Bosh == Chris Bosh hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1984, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 3, Chris Bosh, squliq na p'unro. squ kawas tay 2019, wal malax squ Chris Bosh. Chris Bosh hya ga wal malax senmong pgnaw mari na Amirika. qnxan nya(qyanux nya ) Chris Bosh htagan beh sa t'k'sasco talass.mrkyas beh hacys.Chris Bosh ru sswe mlikuy (joel) krryax mzyu mari maki ngasal.(Joel hiya Bosh sswe mlikuy.) trang payat kawas nya, aring mqbaq mzyu mari maki yaba pqnahan. baha hmswa wagiq balay inqyasan nya,yasa thoyay maku mzyu mari kryax. Bosh si ki tehok pqwasan laqi cikuy aring mqbaq mzyu mari smsum mpspung cyux maki lingay ngasal yaki mu. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Chris Bosh sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. kingpay na tkura' mari' na mmlikuy sa kawas tay (2008) na Olympic Games. champion NBA(2012,2013). cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß == ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē / pkaki Ē kks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. s~…ēqu kawas~…ē taj ****, wal malax s~…ēqu ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß. ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß ńßja …£a wal malax s~…ēenmoŇč p…£naw mari na amirika. qnxan nja(qjanux nja ) ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa t Ēk Ēs~…ēas~…ē ¶~ ®o talas~…ēs~…ē.mrkjas~…ē ő≤eńß ńßa ¶~ ®js~…ē. ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß ru s~…ēs~…ēwe mlikuj (joel) krrjax mzju mari maki Ňčas~…ēal.(*oel ńßija ő≤os~…ēńß s~…ēs~…ēwe mlikuj.) traŇč pajat kawas~…ē nja, ariŇč mqő≤aq mzju mari maki jaő≤a pqnańßan. ő≤ańßa ńßms~…ēwa wa…£iq ő≤alaj inqjas~…ēan nja,jas~…ēa tńßojaj maku mzju mari krjax. ő≤os~…ēńß s~…ēi ki teńßok pqwas~…ēan laqi ¶~ ®ikuj ariŇč mqő≤aq mzju mari s~…ēms~…ēum mps~…ēpuŇč ¶~ ®jux maki liŇčaj Ňčas~…ēal jaki mu. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē rjax qnxan nqu ¶~ ®ńßris~…ē ő≤os~…ēńß s~…ēa s~…ēenmuŇč p…£naw…£an mari Ē. kiŇčpaj na tkura Ē mari Ē na mmlikuj s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj (****) na oljmpi ¶~ ® …£ames~…ē. ¶~ ®ńßampion nő≤a(****,****). ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
